name: Fermented Kohlrabi
steps: Weigh kohlrabi and for each 1 kg kohlrabi season with 2% Maldon Salt, 0.5% sugar, 30g piece of peeled sliced ginger, 10g garlic, 1 pc of seedless long chili.
Check variety of chili with senior team.
Peel the external green color of kohlrabi and slice kohlrabi using a mandoline to approximately 2-3 mm thick slices.
Check with a senior team on thickness.
